service_list.name: New Build Residential
service_list.brief: Specialising in new home construction roofing with premium Colorbond installations for custom-built homes where quality and precision are paramount.

service_list.name: Commercial New Builds
service_list.brief: Premium commercial roofing for new construction projects with coordinated scheduling, quality materials, and professional site management for builders and developers.

service_list.name: Metal Roof Maintenance & Repairs
service_list.brief: Specialised maintenance for existing metal roofing systems including storm damage response, leak detection, and protective treatments to extend the life of Colorbond roofs.

service_list.name: Premium Guttering
service_list.brief: Complete roofing systems with custom box gutters, architectural fascias, and engineered drainage solutions that complement premium roofing installations.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Premium Metal Roofing for Queensland's Best New Builds
improved_hero_copy.subhead: Specialist Colorbond and architectural metal roofing for builders, developers, and high-end residential projects across Brisbane.

improved_hero_copy.h1: New Build Roofing Done to Builder-Grade Standards
improved_hero_copy.subhead: From luxury homes to commercial developments, NBMR delivers precise scheduling, premium materials, and licensed workmanship.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Trusted Metal Roofing Specialists for Premium Construction
improved_hero_copy.subhead: North Brisbane Metal Roofing partners with builders and developers who need reliable delivery, clean detailing, and lasting roof systems.

improved_service_descriptions.name: New Build Residential
improved_service_descriptions.description: Premium Colorbond and metal roofing for custom homes, delivered with the accuracy, finish, and coordination expected on high-end residential builds.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Commercial New Builds
improved_service_descriptions.description: Professional metal roofing for new commercial projects, with reliable scheduling, quality materials, and site-ready coordination for builders and developers.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Metal Roof Maintenance & Repairs
improved_service_descriptions.description: Targeted repairs and maintenance for existing metal roofs, including leak detection, storm damage response, and treatments that help extend roof life.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Premium Guttering
improved_service_descriptions.description: Custom gutters, box gutters, fascias, and drainage details designed to integrate cleanly with premium metal roofing systems.

meta_descriptions.description: North Brisbane Metal Roofing specialises in premium Colorbond and metal roofing for new homes, commercial builds, maintenance, repairs, and guttering across Brisbane.
Explore NBMR's new build residential roofing, commercial metal roofing, roof maintenance, repairs, and premium guttering services for Brisbane projects.

trust_signals_to_emphasize.signal: Works with trusted suppliers including Velux, Colorbond, Truecore, Apex, and QBCC
Specialist focus on new construction projects

brief.redesign_brief: Keep NBMR's premium builder-focused positioning, strong Colorbond and new-build messaging, supplier credibility, QBCC/licensed trust signals, and clear phone/email contact paths. Improve the current site by removing generic platform meta copy and noindex settings, strengthening service-page depth, making trust signals more specific, clarifying service areas, adding real project case studies and testimonials if available, and tightening conversion paths around quote requests. The redesign matters because the business is positioned for high-value residential and commercial work, so the website needs to feel credible, precise, and search-ready for builders, developers, and premium homeowners comparing specialist roofing contractors.

ready_to_build_concerns: No physical address found in crawl.
No ABN, QBCC number, or specific licence number found; only QBCC wording/logo appears.
No owner name, team members, or real testimonials found.
Current metadata contains generic web application copy.
Only 2 pages crawled, with limited About, Contact, Locations, Projects, and service detail available in the supplied scrape.
